Local NeuroCorrelation browser mirror

Source attribution:
- Project: https://github.com/Axelwickm/NeuroCorrelation
- Live article/runtime source: https://axelwickman.com/articles/neurocorrelation

This folder hosts a local mirror of the current browser bundle so AIweb can run
the simulation without compiling the C++ project on this machine.

Expected files:
- index.mjs
- dist/neurocorrelation.mjs
- dist/neurocorrelation.wasm
- dist/neurocorrelation.data
